sources.name: Municipal Demarcation Board ArcGIS Open Data
sources.notes: Official MDB ArcGIS portal. Query for Johannesburg wards. May require manual export.

sources.name: open.africa Johannesburg Ward Shapefile
sources.notes: Practical fallback. Sourced from Demarcation Board Gauteng GIS data.

sources.name: City of Johannesburg Ward Map Books
sources.notes: Useful for validating ward numbers, regions, area names. Not suitable for automated polygon import.
